    Reviews
    4.3
    (530)
    Diners like this restaurant's delicious and flavorful fajitas, tacos, and burritos, as well as the creamy horchata and fantastic salsa. They also highlight the great, quick, and attentive service from the sweet and kind staff.Some reviews mention the food can be overpriced.

    People also ask
    Does Hacienda have a senior discount?
    La Hacienda invites you to dine with us. We offer 15% discounts to seniors and military every Wednesday.

    La Hacienda weekly food promotions - Facebook


    Facebook
    https://www.facebook.com › groups › posts
    Facebook
    https://www.facebook.com › groups › posts
    Is there a dress code at La Hacienda?
    With a capacity for 134 guests, La Hacienda is the perfect place for those who wish to immerse themselves in the tradition and authenticity of Mexican food and enjoy an unforgettable dining experience. The dress code is casual for all diners.

    La Hacienda Restaurant. Hotel At Xcaret Destination - Barcelo


    Barcelo
    https://www.barcelo.com › en-us › cuisine › la-hacienda-...
    Barcelo
    https://www.barcelo.com › en-us › cuisine › la-hacienda-...
    Is La Hacienda a buffet?
    La Hacienda Buffet Restaurant offers a varied and delicious dining experience. This spacious restaurant features a buffet that showcases a wide selection of international dishes and local specialties. Diners can enjoy a variety of choices, from fresh salads to hot dishes and tempting desserts.

    La Hacienda Buffet Restaurant at Barceló Maya Palace - Barcelo


    Barcelo
    https://www.barcelo.com › en-us › cuisine › la-hacienda-...
    Barcelo
    https://www.barcelo.com › en-us › cuisine › la-hacienda-...
    What makes Hacienda Real Mexican Food unique?
    At Hacienda, we make everything fresh. Our recipes come from family traditions passed down over generations. From handmade tortillas to carefully prepared meats and sauces, we focus on doing things the right way—not the easy way.

    Our Story - Hacienda
